description: LSEG provides financial markets data, analytics, trading, and risk products. Its developer portal catalogs APIs and tools for accessing market data, identifiers, analytics, and screening services.
summary: LSEG exposes documented HTTP APIs including Open PermID and LSEG Data Platform APIs, plus a known OAuth-protected MCP server at https://api.analytics.lseg.com/lfa/mcp/server-cl.
